overview: A medical spa offering cosmetic treatments including injectables, laser skin resurfacing, hair restoration, and dermatology services, with additional health and wellness offerings.
highlights: Botox, dermal fillers, and liquid facelift injectables
Laser skin resurfacing, chemical peels, and acne scar treatment
Hair restoration and body sculpting treatments
targetAudience: Individuals seeking cosmetic enhancements and aesthetic treatments in the Charlotte Metro and Greensboro, NC areas.
